query:
ALTER TABLE iteration_runs 
ADD COLUMN parent_run_id INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN variation_layer ENUM('parent', 'child') DEFAULT 'parent',
ADD COLUMN variation_type VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_parent_run FOREIGN KEY (parent_run_id) REFERENCES iteration_runs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
